title: Trend following
summary: Follows the short-window return direction from the feature cache.

supportedVenues.notes: Current runtime execution and canary coverage is bounded to the Jupiter bridge.

assetConstraints.notes: The base asset is selected from the deployment pair at registration time.
The quote leg must remain USD-denominated for current budgeting and canary controls.

featureRequirements.notes: Requires fresh short-window return inputs for every evaluation.

parameterSpecs.label: Max notional USD
parameterSpecs.notes: Upper bound for any single evaluation or slice.

parameterSpecs.label: Max slippage bps
parameterSpecs.notes: Execution slippage ceiling enforced by the runtime bridge.

parameterSpecs.label: Daily loss limit USD
parameterSpecs.notes: Daily stop-loss cap enforced by runtime risk controls.

promotionPolicy.notes: Signal-driven templates require fresh features and remain bounded to safe-lane live rollout.
